examples: This is Simony (Chun-yip Lai). He has a sense of humor. His eloquence is also impressive.

What the Pope was fighting was simony, and the only way to put an end to this was to end all connection of the prince and ecclesiastical appointments.
Ms. Simony volunteered for the study and agreed to will the researchers her brain.
